data.title: Fill in project docs: CLAUDE.md placeholders + AGENTS.md/GEMINI.md §5

data.body: Review (fresh-context sub-agent): PASS. Verified commit 3c372df against acceptance criteria. Zero placeholders remain; Stack matches build spec §4 exactly (nothing invented/omitted); uv correctly labeled toolchain/planned, not a spec requirement; Remote URL exact; Commands + Project-structure carry 'not scaffolded yet' banners (no false claim of runnable code); Lattice mandate + multi-surface + Git-workflow prose unchanged except the Remote line; AGENTS.md §5 and GEMINI.md §5 byte-identical and faithful to spec §3/§9. Two cosmetic non-blocking nits (invariant 5 adds 'tools' to the ports list — a faithful clarification; Commands cites §11 loosely). Neither warrants rework. -> done.
